# 着陆页现代化设计改进

以下是参考Cursor、v0等现代科技软件设计风格的全面改进方案，保留了原有的紫橙色系：

```html:langding-page.html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <meta name="description" content="StyleSwift - AI-powered Chrome extension for customizing and beautifying web pages. Join the waitlist today!" />
  <title>StyleSwift | AI Web Page Beautifier</title>
  
  <!-- Google Fonts - 添加更现代的字体 -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  
  <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  <script>
    tailwind.config = {
      darkMode: 'class',
      theme: {
        extend: {
          colors: {
            purple: {
              50: '#f5f3ff',
              100: '#ede9fe',
              200: '#ddd6fe',
              300: '#c4b5fd',
              400: '#a78bfa',
              500: '#8b5cf6',
              600: '#8E49E7',
              700: '#7c3aed',
              800: '#6d28d9',
              900: '#5b21b6',
            },
            orange: {
              400: '#f7ae51',
              500: '#f97316',
            },
            dark: {
              800: '#1e1e2e',
              900: '#0f0f1a',
            }
          },
          fontFamily: {
            sans: ['"Plus Jakarta Sans"', 'system-ui', 'sans-serif'],
          },
          animation: {
            'float': 'float 6s ease-in-out infinite',
            'pulse-slow': 'pulse 4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite',
            'gradient-shift': 'gradient-shift 8s ease infinite',
            'spin-slow': 'spin 8s linear infinite',
          },
          boxShadow: {
            'glow': '0 0 20px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3)',
            'glow-lg': '0 0 30px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.4)',
          }
        },
      },
    }
  </script>

  <style>
    @keyframes float {
      0% { transform: translateY(0px); }
      50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
      100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
    }
    
    @keyframes gradient-shift {
      0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
      50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
      100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    }
    
    .bg-gradient-animate {
      background-size: 200% 200%;
      animation: gradient-shift 8s ease infinite;
    }

    .glass-effect {
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    }

    .mask-gradient {
      mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,1) 60%, rgba(0,0,0,0));
      -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,1) 60%, rgba(0,0,0,0));
    }

    .noise-bg {
      background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.1'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
      background-position: center;
      background-size: cover;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="font-sans antialiased text-gray-900 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-dark-900 dark:text-gray-100 transition-colors duration-300">
  <!-- Decorative elements -->
  <div class="fixed -top-24 -left-24 w-96 h-96 bg-purple-500/20 dark:bg-purple-600/10 rounded-full blur-3xl opacity-70 mix-blend-multiply dark:mix-blend-lighten"></div>
  <div class="fixed -bottom-32 -right-32 w-96 h-96 bg-orange-400/30 dark:bg-orange-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl opacity-70 mix-blend-multiply dark:mix-blend-lighten"></div>
  <div class="fixed top-1/4 right-1/4 w-64 h-64 bg-purple-400/20 dark:bg-purple-400/10 rounded-full blur-3xl opacity-50 mix-blend-multiply dark:mix-blend-lighten animate-pulse-slow"></div>
  
  <!-- Header -->
  <header class="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 transition-all duration-300 glass-effect">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6">
      <div class="flex items-center justify-between h-16 md:h-20">
        <div class="flex items-center">
          <div class="relative">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 blur opacity-40 rounded-full animate-pulse-slow"></div>
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="relative text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400">

            </svg>

            StyleSwift
          </span>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Desktop Navigation -->
        <nav class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-10">

          <button id="darkModeToggle" class="p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-dark-800 transition-colors" aria-label="Toggle dark mode">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="hidden dark:block text-yellow-300">
              <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="5"/>
              <line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="3"/>
              <line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="23"/>
              <line x1="4.22" y1="4.22" x2="5.64" y2="5.64"/>

              <line x1="21" y1="12" x2="23" y2="12"/>

            </svg>
          </button>
        </nav>
        
        <!-- Mobile Menu Button -->
        <div class="flex items-center md:hidden">

            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="hidden dark:block text-yellow-300">

    </div>
    
    <!-- Mobile Navigation -->
    <div id="mobileMenu" class="hidden md:hidden glass-effect absolute top-full left-0 right-0 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800">
      <nav class="flex flex-col space-y-4 p-6">
        <a href="#features" class="text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 hover:text-purple-600 dark:hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors font-medium py-2">Features</a>

      </nav>
    </div>
  </header>

  <main>
    <!-- Hero Section -->
    <section class="pt-32 pb-20 md:pt-40 md:pb-32 relative overflow-hidden">
      <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50/80 to-white dark:from-dark-900 dark:to-dark-800 mask-gradient"></div>
      
      <!-- Geometric shapes -->
      <div class="absolute top-20 left-10 w-64 h-64 rounded-full border border-purple-200 dark:border-purple-800/30 opacity-40 animate-spin-slow"></div>
      <div class="absolute bottom-20 right-10 w-32 h-32 rounded-full border border-orange-200 dark:border-orange-800/30 opacity-40 animate-spin-slow"></div>
      <div class="absolute top-40 right-20 w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-purple-400/10 dark:bg-purple-400/5 animate-float"></div>
      <div class="absolute bottom-40 left-20 w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-orange-400/10 dark:bg-orange-400/5 animate-float" style="animation-delay: 1s;"></div>
      
      <div class="noise-bg absolute inset-0 opacity-20"></div>
      
      <div class="container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 relative">
        <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto text-center mb-16">
          <div class="inline-block mb-3">
            <span class="px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/30 text-purple-800 dark:text-purple-300">
              Beta Access Coming Soon
            </span>
          </div>
          <h1 class="text-4xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold leading-tight mb-6 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-fuchsia-500 to-orange-400 dark:from-purple-400 dark:via-fuchsia-300 dark:to-orange-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-animate">
            Transform any website with AI magic
          </h1>
          <p class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 mb-12 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
            Join thousands of users who are already enhancing their browsing experience with AI-powered customization and personalized widgets.
          </p>
          <div class="max-w-xl mx-auto">
            <form class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4" onsubmit="handleWaitlistSubmit(event)">
              <input 
                type="email" 
                placeholder="Enter your email address"
                class="flex-1 px-6 py-4 rounded-full border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-700 bg-white dark:bg-dark-800/50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 text-lg dark:text-white transition-colors duration-300"
              />
              <button 
                class="px-8 py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 text-white rounded-full font-medium text-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-glow transform hover:scale-105 flex items-center justify-center"
              >
                <span>Join Waitlist</span>
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="ml-2">
                  <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>
                  <polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"></polyline>
                </svg>
              </button>
            </form>
            <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 mt-4">
              Try StyleSwift free during beta. No credit card required.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="relative max-w-5xl mx-auto">
          <div class="absolute -inset-0.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 rounded-xl blur-sm opacity-70 group-hover:opacity-100 transition duration-1000 animate-pulse-slow"></div>
          <div class="relative w-full aspect-video bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 to-gray-800 rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden group cursor-pointer">
            <video 
              class="w-full h-full object-cover opacity-80"
              poster="https://images.pexels.com/photos/3861958/pexels-photo-3861958.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1260&h=750&dpr=2"

              <div class="w-20 h-20 bg-white dark:bg-white/90 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl transform transition-transform group-hover:scale-110">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="text-purple-600 ml-1">

        </div>

    </section>

    <!-- Features Section -->
    <section id="features" class="py-24 relative">
      <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white dark:bg-dark-800"></div>
      <div class="container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 relative">
        <div class="text-center mb-16">
          <span class="inline-block px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/30 text-purple-800 dark:text-purple-300 mb-3">
            Powerful Features
          </span>
          <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 dark:from-purple-400 dark:to-orange-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent">AI-Powered Web Experience</h2>
          <p class="text-lg text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            StyleSwift combines AI intelligence with powerful customization tools to transform your browsing experience.
          </p>
        </div>
        
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
          <!-- Feature 1 -->
          <div class="group relative">
            <!-- Card glow effect -->
            <div class="absolute -inset-0.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-purple-400 rounded-xl blur opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-70 transition duration-300"></div>
            <div class="relative bg-white dark:bg-dark-900 border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 h-full">
              <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-purple-700 mb-6 flex items-center justify-center transform group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-lg">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="text-white">
                  <path d="M15.24 2H8.76a5 5 0 0 0-5 5v10a5 5 0 0 0 5 5h6.48a5 5 0 0 0 5-5V7a5 5 0 0 0-5-5Z"/>

                </svg>
              </div>

              <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Transform any webpage with a single click using our intelligent AI engine that understands design principles.</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Feature 2 -->
          <div class="group relative">
            <!-- Card glow effect -->
            <div class="absolute -inset-0.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-400 to-orange-600 rounded-xl blur opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-70 transition duration-300"></div>
            <div class="relative bg-white dark:bg-dark-900 border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 h-full">
              <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-400 to-orange-600 mb-6 flex items-center justify-center transform group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-lg">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="text-white">
                  <path d="M12 3L1 9L12 15L23 9L12 3Z"/>
                  <path d="M1 9V15L12 21L23 15V9"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 group-hover:text-orange-500 transition-colors">Global Widgets</h3>
              <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Add useful personalized widgets to any website, from notes and reminders to custom tools.</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Feature 3 -->
          <div class="group relative">
            <!-- Card glow effect -->
            <div class="absolute -inset-0.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 rounded-xl blur opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-70 transition duration-300"></div>
            <div class="relative bg-white dark:bg-dark-900 border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 p-8 h-full">
              <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-600 to-orange-400 mb-6 flex items-center justify-center transform group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-lg">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="text-white">
                  <line x1="4" y1="21" x2="4" y2="14"/>
                  <line x1="4" y1="10" x2="4" y2="3"/>
                  <line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="12"/>
                  <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="3"/>
                  <line x1="20" y1="21" x2="20" y2="16"/>
                  <line x1="20" y1="12" x2="20" y2="3"/>
                  <line x1="2" y1="14" x2="6" y2="14"/>
                  <line x1="10" y1="8" x2="14" y2="8"/>
                  <line x1="18" y1="16" x2="22" y2="16"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 group-hover:text-purple-600 dark:group-hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors">Element Customization</h3>
              <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Precisely select and customize any webpage element with fine-tuned control over styles and appearance.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Compatibility Section -->
    <section class="py-24 relative overflow-hidden">
      <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-dark-900"></div>
      <div class="absolute inset-0 noise-bg opacity-20"></div>
      <div class="container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 relative">
        <div class="text-center mb-16">
          <span class="inline-block px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/30 text-purple-800 dark:text-purple-300 mb-3">
            Broad Compatibility
          </span>
          <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 dark:from-purple-400 dark:to-orange-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
            Works with 96% of Websites
          </h2>
          <p class="text-lg text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            StyleSwift integrates seamlessly with most popular websites and platforms
          </p>
        </div>

        <div class="relative px-4 py-6 rounded-2xl bg-white/50 dark:bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800">
          <div class="flex space-x-12 overflow-hidden">
            <div class="flex space-x-12 animate-marquee whitespace-nowrap">
              <img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/2173508/pexels-photo-2173508.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=300" alt="Logo 1" class="h-12 w-auto object-contain grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-300">
              <img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/300M/pexels-photo-300M.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=300" alt="Logo 2" class="h-12 w-auto object-contain grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-300">
              <img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/2882634/pexels-photo-2882634.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=300" alt="Logo 3" class="h-12 w-auto object-contain grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-300">
              <img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1036808/pexels-photo-1036808.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=300" alt="Logo 4" class="h-12 w-auto object-contain grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-300">
              <img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1334597/pexels-photo-1334597.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=300" alt="Logo 5" class="h-12 w-auto object-contain grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-300">
              <img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1637436/pexels-photo-1637436.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=300" alt="Logo 6" class="h-12 w-auto object-contain grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-300">
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- How It Works Section -->
    <section id="how-it-works" class="py-24 relative">
      <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white dark:bg-dark-800"></div>
      <div class="container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 relative">
        <div class="text-center mb-16">
          <span class="inline-block px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/30 text-purple-800 dark:text-purple-300 mb-3">
            Simple Process
          </span>
          <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 dark:from-purple-400 dark:to-orange-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent">How It Works</h2>
          <p class="text-lg text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            StyleSwift makes webpage customization intuitive and powerful.
          </p>
        </div>
        
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
          <!-- Step 1 -->
          <div class="group relative bg-white dark:bg-dark-900 rounded-xl p-8 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800">
            <div class="absolute -right-3 -top-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-600 to-purple-400 text-white w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg shadow-lg">1</div>
            <div class="flex flex-col items-start">
              <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/30 flex items-center justify-center mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400">
                  <path d="M12 22c6.23-.05 8.24-4.03 8.24-10.01S18.23 2.05 12 2 3.76 6.03 3.76 12.01 5.77 22.05 12 22"></path>
                  <path d="m13.38 17.44 3.84-2.16v-4.79l-3.84-2.12-3.86 2.12v4.79Z"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 group-hover:text-purple-600 dark:group-hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors">Install the Extension</h3>
              <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Add StyleSwift to Chrome with just one click. Set it up in seconds.</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Step 2 -->
          <div class="group relative bg-white dark:bg-dark-900 rounded-xl p-8 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800">
            <div class="absolute -right-3 -top-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-orange-400 text-white w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg shadow-lg">2</div>
            <div class="flex flex-col items-start">
              <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-orange-100 dark:bg-orange-900/30 flex items-center justify-center mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="text-orange-500 dark:text-orange-400">
                  <path d="m12 8-9.04 9.06a2.82 2.82 0 1 0 3.98 3.98L16 12"></path>
                  <circle cx="17" cy="7" r="5"></circle>

              </div>
              <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 group-hover:text-orange-500 transition-colors">Choose Your Style</h3>
              <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Select from curated styles or create your own custom look.</p>
            </div>
          </div>

```html:langding-page.html
          <!-- Step 3 -->
          <div class="group relative bg-white dark:bg-dark-900 rounded-xl p-8 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800">
            <div class="absolute -right-3 -top-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-400 to-orange-600 text-white w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg shadow-lg">3</div>
            <div class="flex flex-col items-start">
              <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/30 flex items-center justify-center mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400">
                  <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                  <line x1="9" y1="3" x2="9" y2="21"></line>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 group-hover:text-purple-600 dark:group-hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors">Add Widgets</h3>
              <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Drag and drop useful widgets onto any webpage for enhanced functionality.</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Step 4 -->
          <div class="group relative bg-white dark:bg-dark-900 rounded-xl p-8 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800">
            <div class="absolute -right-3 -top-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-600 to-orange-400 text-white w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg shadow-lg">4</div>
            <div class="flex flex-col items-start">
              <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-100 to-orange-100 dark:from-purple-900/30 dark:to-orange-900/30 flex items-center justify-center mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400">
                  <path d="M12.22 2h-.44a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v.18a2 2 0 0 1-1 1.73l-.43.25a2 2 0 0 1-2 0l-.15-.08a2 2 0 0 0-2.73.73l-.22.38a2 2 0 0 0 .73 2.73l.15.1a2 2 0 0 1 1 1.72v.51a2 2 0 0 1-1 1.74l-.15.09a2 2 0 0 0-.73 2.73l.22.38a2 2 0 0 0 2.73.73l.15-.08a2 2 0 0 1 2 0l.43.25a2 2 0 0 1 1 1.73V20a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h.44a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-.18a2 2 0 0 1 1-1.73l.43-.25a2 2 0 0 1 2 0l.15.08a2 2 0 0 0 2.73-.73l.22-.39a2 2 0 0 0-.73-2.73l-.15-.08a2 2 0 0 1-1-1.74v-.5a2 2 0 0 1 1-1.74l.15-.09a2 2 0 0 0 .73-2.73l-.22-.38a2 2 0 0 0-2.73-.73l-.15.08a2 2 0 0 1-2 0l-.43-.25a2 2 0 0 1-1-1.73V4a2 2 0 0 0-2-2z"></path>
                  <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"></circle>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 group-hover:text-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 transition-colors">Fine-tune Elements</h3>
              <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Click on any element to customize its appearance precisely.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="mt-20 flex justify-center">
          <div class="relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-4xl">
            <div class="absolute -inset-0.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 rounded-xl blur-sm opacity-70 animate-pulse-slow"></div>
            <div class="relative">
              <img 
                src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/5926388/pexels-photo-5926388.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1260&h=750&dpr=2" 
                alt="StyleSwift interface demonstration" 
                class="w-full h-auto rounded-xl"
              />
              <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-600/20 to-orange-400/20 rounded-xl"></div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Interactive dots on the image -->
            <div class="absolute top-1/4 left-1/4 w-6 h-6 bg-purple-600 rounded-full animate-pulse-slow cursor-pointer">
              <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-purple-600 rounded-full animate-ping opacity-75"></div>
              <div class="absolute -inset-1 opacity-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300">
                <div class="absolute top-0 left-full ml-4 bg-white dark:bg-dark-800 p-3 rounded-lg shadow-xl whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium">
                  Customize fonts and colors
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="absolute top-1/2 right-1/4 w-6 h-6 bg-orange-400 rounded-full animate-pulse-slow cursor-pointer" style="animation-delay: 0.5s;">
              <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-orange-400 rounded-full animate-ping opacity-75"></div>
              <div class="absolute -inset-1 opacity-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300">
                <div class="absolute top-0 right-full mr-4 bg-white dark:bg-dark-800 p-3 rounded-lg shadow-xl whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium">
                  Add custom widgets
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Waitlist Form Section -->
    <section id="waitlist" class="py-28 relative overflow-hidden">
      <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-600/90 to-orange-400/90 dark:from-purple-800/90 dark:to-orange-600/90"></div>
      <div class="absolute inset-0 noise-bg opacity-5"></div>
      
      <!-- Geometric shapes -->
      <div class="absolute top-20 left-10 w-64 h-64 rounded-full border-4 border-white/10 opacity-40 animate-spin-slow"></div>
      <div class="absolute bottom-20 right-10 w-32 h-32 rounded-full border-4 border-white/10 opacity-40 animate-spin-slow"></div>
      
      <div class="container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 relative">
        <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto glass-effect bg-white/10 dark:bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden border border-white/20">
          <div class="p-8 md:p-12">
            <h2 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-6 text-center text-white">Join the Waitlist</h2>
            <p class="text-white/80 mb-8 text-center">
              Be among the first to experience the future of web browsing. Enter your email to join our waiting list and get early access.
            </p>
            
            <form id="waitlistForm" class="space-y-4" onsubmit="handleWaitlistSubmit(event)">
              <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4">
                <input
                  type="email"
                  placeholder="Enter your email address"
                  class="flex-1 px-6 py-4 rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/50 text-white placeholder-white/70"
                  required
                />
                <button
                  type="submit"
                  class="px-8 py-4 bg-white text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-800 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-glow hover:shadow-white/30 whitespace-nowrap flex items-center justify-center"
                >
                  <span>Join Waitlist</span>
                  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="ml-2">
                    <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>
                    <polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"></polyline>
                  </svg>
                </button>
              </div>
            </form>
            
            <div class="mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-white/10 text-center text-sm text-white/70">
              By joining the waitlist, you'll receive updates about StyleSwift's launch. We respect your privacy and won't spam you.
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <footer class="bg-white dark:bg-dark-900 py-12 md:py-16 relative overflow-hidden">
    <div class="absolute inset-0 noise-bg opacity-30"></div>
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 relative">
      <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center">
        <div class="mb-8 md:mb-0">
          <div class="flex items-center">
            <div class="relative">
              <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 blur opacity-40 rounded-full"></div>
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="relative text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400">
                <path d="m21.64 3.64-1.28-1.28a1.21 1.21 0 0 0-1.72 0L2.36 18.64a1.21 1.21 0 0 0 0 1.72l1.28 1.28a1.2 1.2 0 0 0 1.72 0L21.64 5.36a1.2 1.2 0 0 0 0-1.72Z"/>
                <path d="m14 7 3 3"/>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <span class="ml-2 text-xl font-bold bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-orange-400 dark:from-purple-400 dark:to-orange-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent">StyleSwift</span>
          </div>
          <p class="mt-4 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 max-w-md">
            AI-powered browser extension for customizing and beautifying your web experience.
          </p>
        </div>
        
        <div class="flex space-x-6">
          <a href="#" class="group relative p-2 rounded-full bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-purple-600 dark:hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors" aria-label="Twitter">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600/80 to-orange-400/80 rounded-full opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 blur-sm transition-opacity duration-300"></div>
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="relative">
              <path d="M22 4s-.7 2.1-2 3.4c1.6 10-9.4 17.3-18 11.6 2.2.1 4.4-.6 6-2C3 15.5.5 9.6 3 5c2.2 2.6 5.6 4.1 9 4-.9-4.2 4-6.6 7-3.8 1.1 0 3-1.2 3-1.2z"/>
            </svg>
          </a>
          <a href="#" class="group relative p-2 rounded-full bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-purple-600 dark:hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors" aria-label="Instagram">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600/80 to-orange-400/80 rounded-full opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 blur-sm transition-opacity duration-300"></div>
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="relative">
              <rect width="20" height="20" x="2" y="2" rx="5" ry="5"/>
              <path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z"/>
              <line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/>
            </svg>
          </a>
          <a href="#" class="group relative p-2 rounded-full bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-purple-600 dark:hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors" aria-label="Facebook">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600/80 to-orange-400/80 rounded-full opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 blur-sm transition-opacity duration-300"></div>
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="relative">
              <path d="M18 2h-3a5 5 0 0 0-5 5v3H7v4h3v8h4v-8h3l1-4h-4V7a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h3z"/>
            </svg>
          </a>
          <a href="#" class="group relative p-2 rounded-full bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-purple-600 dark:hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors" aria-label="Github">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600/80 to-orange-400/80 rounded-full opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 blur-sm transition-opacity duration-300"></div>
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="relative">
              <path d="M15 22v-4a4.8 4.8 0 0 0-1-3.5c3 0 6-2 6-5.5.08-1.25-.27-2.48-1-3.5.28-1.15.28-2.35 0-3.5 0 0-1 0-3 1.5-2.64-.5-5.36-.5-8 0C6 2 5 2 5 2c-.3 1.15-.3 2.35 0 3.5A5.403 5.403 0 0 0 4 9c0 3.5 3 5.5 6 5.5-.39.49-.68 1.05-.85 1.65-.17.6-.22 1.23-.15 1.85v4"/>
              <path d="M9 18c-4.51 2-5-2-7-2"/>
            </svg>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center">
        <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-6 mb-4 md:mb-0 justify-center md:justify-start">
          <a href="#" class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-purple-600 dark:hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors">Privacy Policy</a>
          <a href="#" class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-purple-600 dark:hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors">Terms of Service</a>
          <a href="#" class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-purple-600 dark:hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors">Contact</a>
        </div>
        
        <div class="text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-500 text-sm">
          © <span id="currentYear"></span> StyleSwift. All rights reserved.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </footer>

  <script>
    // Mobile menu toggle
    function toggleMobileMenu() {
      const menu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
      menu.classList.toggle('hidden');
    }

    // Update copyright year
    document.getElementById('currentYear').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();

    // Handle waitlist form submission
    function handleWaitlistSubmit(event) {
      event.preventDefault();
      const form = event.target;
      const email = form.querySelector('input[type="email"]').value;
      
      // Here you would typically send the email to your backend
      console.log('Waitlist submission:', email);
      
      // Show success message
      form.innerHTML = `
        <div class="text-center py-8">
          <div class="w-16 h-16 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
            <svg class="w-8 h-8 text-white" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"></path>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Thank You!</h3>
          <p class="text-white/80">
            You've been added to our waitlist. We'll notify you when StyleSwift is ready for you to try.
          </p>
        </div>
      `;
    }

    // Smooth scroll for anchor links
    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
      anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
        if (target) {
          target.scrollIntoView({
            behavior: 'smooth'
          });
        }
        // Close mobile menu if open
        const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
        if (!mobileMenu.classList.contains('hidden')) {
          toggleMobileMenu();
        }
      });
    });

    // Dark mode toggle
    const darkModeToggle = document.getElementById('darkModeToggle');
    const mobileDarkModeToggle = document.getElementById('mobileDarkModeToggle');
    
    // Check for dark mode preference
    if (localStorage.getItem('darkMode') === 'enabled' || 
        (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches && localStorage.getItem('darkMode') !== 'disabled')) {
      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');
    }
    
    function toggleDarkMode() {
      if (document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark')) {
        document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');
        localStorage.setItem('darkMode', 'disabled');
      } else {
        document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');
        localStorage.setItem('darkMode', 'enabled');
      }
    }
    
    darkModeToggle.addEventListener('click', toggleDarkMode);
    mobileDarkModeToggle.addEventListener('click', toggleDarkMode);

    // Header scroll effect
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      const header = document.querySelector('header');
      if (window.scrollY > 10) {
        header.classList.add('bg-white/80', 'dark:bg-dark-900/80', 'border-b', 'border-gray-200', 'dark:border-gray-800');
      } else {
        header.classList.remove('bg-white/80', 'dark:bg-dark-900/80', 'border-b', 'border-gray-200', 'dark:border-gray-800');
      }
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>
```

---
